feed.title: whimsysoul
feed.subtitle: OK Boomer, all the latest TikToks from whimsysoul

entry.title: nobody warned me THIS would be the view from our Berlin hotel room!! Its extra beautiful at night when the Berlin TV tower is all lit up! 📍 Hotel Mani in Mitte #berlin #hotelamano #germany #berliner #berlinhotel #berlintvtower #whimsysoul
entry.content: nobody warned me THIS would be the view from our Berlin hotel room!! Its extra beautiful at night when the Berlin TV tower is all lit up! 📍 Hotel Mani in Mitte #berlin #hotelamano #germany #berliner #berlinhotel #berlintvtower #whimsysoul

entry.title: this is only 50 mins from Berlin ⬇️ Most people never make it out of Berlin and miss Potsdam, the cutest little town just ~50 minutes outside Berlin via train!! Sanssouci Palace is a stunning palace Built by Prussian King Frederick the Great as his summer
entry.content: this is only 50 mins from Berlin ⬇️ Most people never make it out of Berlin and miss Potsdam, the cutest little town just ~50 minutes outside Berlin via train!! Sanssouci Palace is a stunning palace Built by Prussian King Frederick the Great as his summer

entry.title: like WHY are you all here? You all had to visit THIS spot today too?? Go away everyone but me please and thank you 😂 #tourist #lisbon #portugal #travelhumor #lol #whimsysoul #tourism #europe #europesummer #lisbonportugal
entry.content: like WHY are you all here? You all had to visit THIS spot today too?? Go away everyone but me please and thank you 😂 #tourist #lisbon #portugal #travelhumor #lol #whimsysoul #tourism #europe #europesummer #lisbonportugal

entry.title: my food roman empire is this Turkish dish I had in Berlin in 2022 at Markthalle Neun. I dragged the whole family over to see if this Manti stand is still here, and it is!!! Turkish Manti is a delicious meat filled dumpling covered in a spicy tomato sauce
entry.content: my food roman empire is this Turkish dish I had in Berlin in 2022 at Markthalle Neun. I dragged the whole family over to see if this Manti stand is still here, and it is!!! Turkish Manti is a delicious meat filled dumpling covered in a spicy tomato sauce

entry.title: thank god he married a Type A Virgo 💅 ✈️ who else can relate? ⭐️ follow me for more relatable travel stories ⭐️ #travel #travelhumor #goldenretrieverhusband #airplane #travelplanner #airport #whimsysoul #lol #travellife

entry.title: Which one are you?? 🫣 i find it so hard to sleep in on trips, i wanna see everythinggg! Follow me for more relatable travel content! #travel #husbandandwife #lol #travelhumor #earlybird #traveltips #lisbon
entry.content: Which one are you?? 🫣 i find it so hard to sleep in on trips, i wanna see everythinggg! Follow me for more relatable travel content! #travel #husbandandwife #lol #travelhumor #earlybird #traveltips #lisbon

entry.title: OMG we're ready for you to visit! 😱 Book a stay at the Whimsy Homes cabin - my Airbnb listing link is in my bio 🥰 @Whimsy Homes Cabin I’ve spent all year renovating my old cabin in Arnold, California to turn it from meh to amazing and I can’t believe it’
entry.content: OMG we're ready for you to visit! 😱 Book a stay at the Whimsy Homes cabin - my Airbnb listing link is in my bio 🥰 @Whimsy Homes Cabin I’ve spent all year renovating my old cabin in Arnold, California to turn it from meh to amazing and I can’t believe it’

entry.title: Ditch the sad beige, find your magic! ⭐️ Join me for hidden gems around California & the world, colorful outfits, definitely too much wine and tons of whimsy from your neighborhood ginger. (P.S. there’s a cabin…) @Whimsy Homes Cabin Oh, and more bingo. I

entry.title: Replying to @seanlawn breaking news! Second square is off the world cruise bingo card! Shoutout to @joe for alerting us today. What square do we think will be next? #ultimateworldcruise #worldcruise #bingo #worldcruisebingo #whimysoul #royalcaribbean #cr
